recommendations.title: Prelude to a Kiss
recommendations.overview: A couple fall in love despite the girl's pessimistic outlook. As they struggle to come to terms with their relationship, something supernatural happens that tests it.

recommendations.title: 3 Generations
recommendations.overview: A teenager transitions from female to male, and his family must come to terms with that fact.

recommendations.title: Vampire's Kiss
recommendations.overview: A publishing executive is visited and bitten by a vampire and starts exhibiting erratic behavior. He pushes his secretary to extremes as he tries to come to terms with his affliction.

recommendations.title: The Angriest Man in Brooklyn
recommendations.overview: After learning that a brain aneurysm will kill him in about 90 minutes, a perpetually unhappy man struggles to come to terms with his fate and make amends with everyone he has ever hurt.

recommendations.title: Cracks
recommendations.overview: Jealousy flares after the headmistress of an elite boarding school for girls becomes obsessed with a new student.

recommendations.title: El Camino: A Breaking Bad Movie
recommendations.overview: In the wake of his dramatic escape from captivity, Jesse Pinkman must come to terms with his past in order to forge some kind of future.

recommendations.title: Dismissed
recommendations.overview: A straight-edged teacher finds trouble when an honors student is willing to do anything to get an A.

recommendations.title: The Right of Youth
recommendations.overview: Court huntsman, Søtoft, is courting his daughter Else’s lady-in-waiting, Miss Engelke. That’s why it’s a bit of a punch in the stomach when, late one evening, he discovers his son Ove in close contact with her. Chamberlain von Plessen, who had been g

recommendations.title: Me Against You: Mr. S's Vendetta
recommendations.overview: A young couple who makes popular YouTube videos for children sets out to win an award, but an evil mastermind stands in the way of their success.

recommendations.title: Housebound
recommendations.overview: When Kylie Bucknell is sentenced to home detention, she's forced to come to terms with her unsociable behaviour, her blabbering mother and a hostile spirit who seems less than happy about the new living arrangement.
